zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Gleason於1713年5月3日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可福拉米加姆時，她的父親John Gleason31歲，母親Abigail Learned29歲。她和John Drury Sr.至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1766年11月6日在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Gleason于1713年5月3日出生在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可福拉米加姆时，她的父亲John Gleason31岁，母亲Abigail Learned29岁。她和John Drury Sr.至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1766年11月6日在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gleason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Waterford): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glasáin, from a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’.

variants.name: Glasheen
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glaisín,based on a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’. Compare Gleason .

variants.name: Glisan
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Gleason  . This surname is concentrated in IL and PA.

variants.name: Gleeson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Siobhan, Brendan, Conor.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Gleason was born on 3 May 1713, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, her father, John Gleason, was 31 and her mother, Abigail Learned, was 29. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with John Drury Sr.. She died on 6 November 1766, in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Gleason est née le 3 mai 1713, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, John Gleason, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Abigail Learned, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec John Drury Sr.. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1766, à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Gleason am 3. Mai 1713 in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gleason 31 und ihre Mutter Abigail Learned 29. Sie hatte mit John Drury Sr. mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. November 1766 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Gleason è nata il il 3 maggio 1713 nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Gleason, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Abigail Learned, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con John Drury Sr.. Morì il 6 novembre 1766, nel Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Gleasonが1713年5月3日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスフラミンガムで生まれた時，父John Gleasonは31歳，母Abigail Learnedは29歳であった。彼女はJohn Drury Sr.との間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1766年11月6日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターシュリュースブリーで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Gleason(이)가 1713년 5월 3일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gleason(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Learned(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 John Drury Sr.(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1766년 11월 6일 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터 슈레w스버이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Gleason nasceu em 3 de maio de 1713, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Gleason, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Learned, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com John Drury Sr.. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1766, em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Gleason родилась 3 мая 1713 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Gleason было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Abigail Learned, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от John Drury Sr. Она умерла 6 ноября 1766 г. в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Gleason nació el 3 de mayo de 1713, en Framingham, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Gleason, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Abigail Learned, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con John Drury Sr.. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1766, en Shrewsbury, Worcester, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 53 años.
